title: Innergex Renewable Energy Inc. Secures C$107.5M Project Financing for the Portneuf Hydro Portfolio in Québec
content:
## Innergex Renewable Energy Inc. Secures C$107.5M Project Financing for the Portneuf Hydro Portfolio in Québec
Innergex Renewable Energy Inc. (Innergex) closed a C$107.5M financing for the Portneuf hydro portfolio, located on the Portneuf River in Portneuf-sur-Mer within the Seigneurie des Mille-Vaches, Québec.
Innergex Renewable Energy Inc., based in Quebec, is an independent renewable power producer which develops, acquires, owns and operates hydroelectric facilities, wind farms, solar farms and energy storage facilities across Canada, the United States, France and Chile, managing a large portfolio of high-quality assets currently consisting of interests in 91 operating facilities and 16 projects under development, with an aggregate gross installed capacity totaling 10,288 MW.
McCarthy Tetrault advised Innergex Renewable Energy Inc. with a team led by Richard O’Doherty that included, Morgan Troke, François Dupuis, Kean Silverthorn, Quentin Pérès (Financial Services), Mathieu LeBlanc (Corporate), and Craig Shirreff (Real Estate).
